## Checklist

- [ ] Spec file (`JAG-XXX`) exists and acceptance criteria are met
- [ ] Types are strict (no `any`, no `@ts-ignore`)
- [ ] Zod validation applied on all user inputs (frontend + backend)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` values committed
- [ ] Playwright E2E test added or updated
- [ ] ESLint + Prettier pass (`npm run lint` + `npm run format:check`)
- [ ] CI is green
